top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on proposal to require certain payment stablecoin issuers to maintain an effective customer identification program
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on proposal to require certain payment stablecoin issuers to maintain an effective customer identification program
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Alchemy unveils Visa-powered virtual payment card for AI agents
top_signals.summary: AgentCard will default to Visa-issued tokens, but will support crypto and agent-native payment protocols when available.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: Men Jailed in UK for China Spying Targeting Pro-Democracy Groups
top_signals.summary: Two men were jailed for as long as 10 years after being found guilty of spying for China that targeted UK based pro-democracy campaigners.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Meeting of the Court of Directors held on 23 April 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank's Court of Directors acts as a unitary board, setting the organisation's strategy and budget and taking key decisions on resourcing and appointments. Required to meet a minimum seven times per year, it has five executive members from the Bank and up to nine non-executive members.

top_signals.title: Alchemy's AI-driven identity and payment service gains access to Visa network
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Permian natural gas production increased faster than crude oil
top_signals.summary: The Permian region's marketed natural gas production grew from 17.2 billion cubic feet per day (Bcf/d) in 2021 to 27.6 Bcf/d in 2025, a 60% increase, according to data from our latest Short Term Energy Outlook. Over the same period, crude oil production grew by 39%, going from 4.7 million barrels per day (b/d) to 6.6 million b/d. The higher growth in natural gas production is the result of increasing gas-oil ratios (GOR).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Can Strategy pull out of its death spiral? It’s a Stretch . . .
top_signals.summary: Digital credit’s ‘iPhone moment’ has become a tapeworm in the belly of its host

top_signals.title: Intertek board agrees £11bn takeover by private equity group EQT
top_signals.summary: Swedish group is investing alongside Emirati sovereign investors ADIA and Mubadala

top_signals.title: Capital B shareholders approve up to $120B in financing capacity for Bitcoin strategy
top_signals.summary: Capital B shareholders approved up to $120 billion in financing capacity, including equity and credit instruments, to support the company's Bitcoin accumulation strategy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: SpaceX down 3% after three-day rally loses steam
top_signals.summary: Investor bullishness showed signs of waning on Wednesday, as shares sank 5%.
